file_insights.changes_summary: Added error checking for console errors and network failures in test execution
key_modifications: Added error throwing mechanism if console errors or network failures detected
Updated test result object to include console errors and network failures
Expanded error handling in test execution flow

patterns_discovered: Defensive error checking in test runner
Capturing and reporting runtime errors during test execution
Detailed error tracking with console and network error logging
gotchas_discovered: Need to handle console errors and network failures during test runs
Importance of capturing detailed error information for debugging
Extending test result object to include runtime error context

approach_outcome.description: Added error checking after test execution
approach_outcome.impact: Enhanced test runner with comprehensive error detection and reporting

recommendations: Consider adding more granular error categorization
Implement error threshold configurations for test runs
